summary.description: Concise explanation of the curation and compliance review outcome.

decision.description: Overall curation recommendation for the Search and Chat material under review.

evidence.description: Key facts and rationale supporting the curation decision.

flags.description: Short labels for gaps, policy issues, missing citations, or other concerns detected in the chat responses.

capturedDecisions.description: Recorded compliance decisions or mitigations captured during review.

policyRefs.description: HLS policy reference codes applied during review, such as HLS-TRIAL-300 or HLS-LIC-200.

citations.description: Approved or reviewed entity IDs and citation strings from the Search and Chat responses.

sensitive_content_found.description: True when PHI, PII, confidential partner data, or other sensitive content requiring escalation is detected.

required_human_review.description: True when the compliance reviewer gate must act before the response can be finalized; false when the curation outcome is straightforward.
